title: Word Counter
description: Free online word counter. Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs instantly. Estimates reading time and speaking time. Perfect for essays, articles, and social media posts.
placeholder: Paste or type your text here…

results.empty: Start typing to see word and character counts

howToUse.label: Paste your text
howToUse.description: Type or paste any text into the field above.

howToUse.label: View stats instantly
howToUse.description: Word count, character count, sentences, paragraphs, and reading time update in real time.

howToUse.label: Check reading time
howToUse.description: Reading time is estimated at 200 words per minute (average adult reading speed). Speaking time is estimated at 130 words per minute.

faq.question: How are words counted?
faq.answer: Words are counted by splitting the text on whitespace and filtering out empty strings. Hyphenated words (e.g., "well-known") are counted as one word.

faq.question: How is reading time calculated?
faq.answer: Reading time is estimated at 200 words per minute, which is the average silent reading speed for an adult. Speaking time uses 130 words per minute.

faq.question: How are sentences counted?
faq.answer: Sentences are counted by splitting on terminal punctuation (. ! ?). Abbreviations and decimal numbers may occasionally cause slight overcounting.

faq.question: What counts as a paragraph?
faq.answer: A paragraph is a block of text separated by one or more blank lines.

faq.question: Is there a character limit?
faq.answer: There is no enforced limit. The tool runs entirely in your browser and handles large documents well.
